notes: Over a 100fps at Ultra-setttings, no problem.
title: Rise of the Tomb Raider™

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 3400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Native is perfectly fine in X11, but has noticeable performance regressions in Wayland. Refuses to start if SDL_VIDEODRIVER is set to anything but 'x11', so make sure to add that in launch options if you use SDL_VIDEODRIVER=wayland as a global environment variable.
title: Rise of the Tomb Raider™

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 3400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Just a quick follow-up on my previous report - after a bit of searching, the proper solution is to add LD_PRELOAD="/usr/lib/libSDL2.so:/usr/lib32/libSDL2.so:$LD_PRELOAD" as a launch option, as the built-in SDL library for ROTTR does not support SDL_VIDEODRIVER=wayland. This fixes the performance issues but you need to enable V-Sync. Did not notice any input lag related issues as a result of enabling V-Sync.
title: Rise of the Tomb Raider™
